pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO "user" (name, email)
		VALUES ($1, $2)
		RETURNING id
	`, integrationTestName, integrationTestEmail).Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO workspace (name, slug, description)
		VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
		RETURNING id
	`, "Integration Tests", integrationTestWorkspaceSlug, "Temporary workspace for router integration tests").Scan

pool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO agent_runtime (
			workspace_id, daemon_id, name, runtime_mode, provider, status, device_info, metadata, last_seen_at
		)
		VALUES ($1, NULL, $2, 'cloud', $3, 'online', $4, '{}'::jsonb, now())
		RETURNING id
	`, workspaceID, "Integration Test Runtime", "integration_test_runtime", "Integration test runtime").Scan
testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT id FROM "user" WHERE email = $1`, email).Scan
testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT code FROM verification_code WHERE email = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1`, email).Scan
testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT code FROM verification_code WHERE email = $1 ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1`, email).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO workspace (name, slug, description)
		VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
		RETURNING id
	`, "Integration Tests Delete 403", slug, "DeleteWorkspace permission test").Scan
testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM workspace WHERE id = $1)`, wsID).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO inbox_item (workspace_id, recipient_type, recipient_id, type, title)
		VALUES ($1, 'member', $2, 'issue_assigned', 'Summary fixture')
		RETURNING id
	`, testWorkspaceID, testUserID).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO issue (workspace_id, title, creator_type, creator_id)
		VALUES ($1, 'Dedup fixture', 'member', $2)
		RETURNING id
	`, testWorkspaceID, testUserID).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO issue (workspace_id, title, status, priority, creator_type, creator_id, position, parent_issue_id, number)
		VALUES ($1, 'sub-issue test', 'todo', 'medium', 'member', $2, 0, $3,
		        (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(number), 0) + 1 FROM issue WHERE workspace_id = $1))
		RETURNING id
	`, workspaceID, creatorID, parentIssueID).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `
		INSERT INTO issue (workspace_id, title, status, priority, creator_type, creator_id, position, number)
		VALUES ($1, 'subscriber test issue', 'todo', 'medium', 'member', $2, 0,
		        (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(number), 0) + 1 FROM issue WHERE workspace_id = $1))
		RETURNING id
	`, workspaceID, creatorID).Scan

testPool.QueryRow(ctx, `

		VALUES ($1, $2)
		RETURNING id
